purpose: Vendored subset of the Notepad++ plugin C API: NPPM_* / NPPN_* / Scintilla SCI_* / SCN_* / SC_MOD_*/SC_UPDATE_* message constants plus FuncItem, NppData, NppTbData, SCNotification, ShortcutKey, and the PluginCommand callback typedef. Lets Markdown++ talk to Notepad++ without pulling in Notepad++ source headers.
exports: NPPM_GETCURRENTSCINTILLA / NPPM_DMMSHOW / NPPM_DMMHIDE / NPPM_DMMREGASDCKDLG / NPPM_SETMENUITEMCHECK / NPPM_GETPLUGINSCONFIGDIR / NPPM_DOOPEN / NPPM_ALLOCATECMDID / NPPM_GETFULLCURRENTPATH / NPPM_GETCURRENTDIRECTORY / NPPM_GETFILENAME

SCI_GETLENGTH / SCI_GETCURRENTPOS / SCI_GETTEXT / SCI_GETFIRSTVISIBLELINE / SCI_GETLINECOUNT / SCI_LINEFROMPOSITION / SCI_LINESCROLL / SCI_LINESONSCREEN / SCI_VISIBLEFROMDOCLINE / SCI_DOCLINEFROMVISIBLE
SC_MOD_INSERTTEXT / SC_MOD_DELETETEXT / SC_UPDATE_SELECTION / SC_UPDATE_CONTENT / SC_UPDATE_V_SCROLL / SC_UPDATE_H_SCROLL / SCN_UPDATEUI / SCN_MODIFIED
calls_out_to: Notepad++ plugin ABI (FuncItem array exported via getFuncsArray; messages sent with SendMessage to the Notepad++ window)
invariants: Layouts of NppData, NppTbData, FuncItem, ShortcutKey and SCNotification must match Notepad++ exactly or the plugin ABI crashes Notepad++.
kFuncItemNameLength (64) is the Notepad++-defined fixed-size wchar buffer used for menu item names; do not change.
Message constants must stay numerically equal to Notepad++'s real NPPM_/NPPN_/SCI_/SCN_ enums.
gotchas: This file is a hand-maintained subset; if Notepad++ adds messages the plugin needs, they must be added here too (not pulled from a Notepad++ header).
FuncItem._cmdID is filled in by Notepad++ after getFuncsArray returns - do not assume it is non-zero until after NPPN_READY/NPPN_TBMODIFICATION.
